desc: an elderly French retired man in his 70s, flat wool cap, beige knitted cardigan over a plaid shirt, canvas tote bag on his shoulder, warm knowing smile, round cheeks

an elegant French woman in her 50s passionate about Art Deco, sleek dark bob haircut, geometric gold-and-black earrings, emerald green 1920s-inspired coat with a fan-pattern brooch, refined confident smile
a rival French flea-market dealer in his 50s, worn brown leather jacket over a rumpled shirt, stubble, appraising squinted eyes, small notebook and pencil in his breast pocket, sly competitive smirk

a Black French vinyl record collector in his 40s of Caribbean descent, short dreadlocks with a few grey strands, faded band t-shirt under a corduroy blazer, headphones resting around his neck, a vinyl record tucked under one arm, enthusiastic grin
a nostalgic French gamer in his early 30s of Maghrebi descent, dark curly hair, rectangular glasses, open zip hoodie over a retro pixel-art t-shirt, holding an old game cartridge, excited smile

a French bibliophile woman in her 60s of Vietnamese descent, small round glasses, grey-streaked hair in a loose chignon, mustard-yellow cardigan with a shawl, clutching an old leather-bound book to her chest, gentle absorbed smile
a French weekend handyman in his 50s, thick mustache, red-and-black checked flannel overshirt, folding ruler and screwdriver poking out of a chest pocket, sturdy build, cheerful practical grin
a broke French student in his early 20s, knitted beanie, oversized second-hand denim jacket with sewn patches, backpack strap across the chest, sheepish hopeful smile, hands in pockets
a haughty French bourgeois man in his 60s, navy double-breasted blazer with a silk pocket square, paisley ascot, silver swept-back hair, chin lifted, condescending pursed smile
a lost cheerful tourist in his 40s, bucket hat, camera on a strap around his neck, loud flowery shirt under a light windbreaker, unfolded paper map in one hand, wide bewildered smile

a young Black French father in his 30s on a Sunday stroll, short afro fade and neat beard, small laughing toddler sitting on his shoulders holding his hair, casual sweater with rolled sleeves, relaxed happy expression

a chic French interior designer woman in her 30s of North African descent, dark wavy hair in a sleek ponytail, oversized glasses pushed up on her head, structured cream blazer, fabric swatches and a rolled magazine in one hand, assessing stylish smile
a French vintage-loving hipster man in his 30s, curled mustache, denim jacket over a knitted vest, round amber sunglasses hanging on his collar, enamel pins, laid-back approving nod
a distinguished curious French notable in his 60s, three-piece charcoal suit with a pocket-watch chain, neat white beard, one eyebrow raised with intrigued interest, hands clasped on a cane handle
a sharp-eyed French opportunist bargain-hunter in his 40s, tilted flat cap, long coat with deep bulging pockets, lean face, quick darting eyes, thin knowing grin
